name: riha-legal-marketplace
description: Plugin marketplace for RIHA legal advokátní kancelář s.r.o. and AWRA insolvence, v.o.s. — Czech legal tools and automations.

plugins.name: czech-legal-lookup
plugins.description: Search and retrieve Czech legislation, including full text of laws, amendments, and historical versions.

plugins.name: insolvency-register
plugins.description: Query the Czech Insolvency Register (ISIR) for proceedings, creditor claims, and debtor information.

plugins.name: datova-schranka-helper
plugins.description: Generate properly formatted submissions for Czech data boxes (datové schránky) with correct headers and metadata.

plugins.name: aml-provereni
plugins.description: AML client verification per Czech Act No. 253/2008 Sb. — identity checks, public register lookups, PEP screening, sanctions, and risk assessment for legal practice.
